events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the "lock without tag / tag without lock" condition is a sequence violation under OSHA 1910.147(c)(5) — device application requires both a lockout device and an identifying tagout device applied together (absent a documented tagout-only program with added safeguards). This invalidates the subsequent zero-energy verification step, so I flagged `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`, and required corrective action (complete the lock+tag pairing, then re-verify zero energy) before work may resume.
